C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IN ROOM #503B. DOUGLAS SHAW, PRO TEM JUDGE. D. CARTER, CLERK. SONIA WONG, CSR. PARTIES PRESENT: DAVID G. MENDEZ, ATTY. FOR PLAINTIFF C. B. PATEL WHO WAS NOT PRESENT.
